r1.text: The podcast plan must include a specific focus on the named lead tech at West LA Computer Expert.
r1.rationale: The user explicitly requested the podcast topic to be about the named lead tech at West LA Computer Expert, establishing a clear requirement for the focus of the podcast plan.

r2.text: Assistant must provide an audio overview title and metadata, including the duration, for the podcast.
r2.rationale: This requirement is directly grounded in the action where the assistant provides the audio overview title and metadata, including duration.
